title: India offered sanctuary to Iranian ship three days before US sank it
summary_full: India says Tehran sought permission to dock three ships on the day the US and Israel began a war on Iran.
summary_public: India says Tehran sought permission to dock three ships on the day the US and Israel began a war on Iran.
